leadText: Floaty Fall (Japanese: ふわふわフォール Floaty Fall) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves of the partner Pikachu.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Floaty Fall deals damage and has a 30% chance of making the target flinch . Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Floaty Fall cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E The user floats in the air, and then dives at a steep angle to attack the target. This may also make the target flinch. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move appears to be a reference to Flying Pikachu .
